description: Express app importing lodash but only using _.map(), never calling the vulnerable _.template() function. CVE-2021-23337 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: lodash is imported via require('lodash') but only _.map() is used. The vulnerable _.template() function is never called anywhere in source.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable function _.template() is never called. Only _.map() is used to transform an array of user objects, which does not trigger the prototype pollution vulnerability.
